'''Shal'mak''' was a wealthy [[Kian'thar]] from [[Shaum Hii/Legends|Shaum Hii]] who was wife to a [[derlac]] [[Kreet'ah's father|herder]] and fanatical crime lord of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

==Biography==
Shal'mak's heritage consists of a long line of crime lords. Shal'mak's position was inherited from her uncle who inherited it from his second cousin, she later passed on the position of [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] to her son [[Kreet'ah]].

Shal'mak possessed innate empathic abilities which aided her criminal activities making her a very dangerous foe. The [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] employed Shal'mak mostly for money laundering and other financial operations. On a mission to [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] Shal'mak had been directed by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] to reclaim the fortress of [[Alexi Garyn]] after it had been overran by a local syndicate. Shal'mak also worked under the direction of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]].
